name: Pesto Cocktail Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
2. For pesto sauce, place oil, basil, parsley, 3/4 cup cheese, garlic, salt, and pepper in a processor or blender.
3. Using on-off turns, process or blend ingredients for about 2 minutes, scraping down sides of the bowl once or twice.
4. Spread half of pesto sauce evenly over each pizza crust, coming to within 1/2 inch of the edge.
5. Bake until top bubbles, 4 to 5 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup cheese.
7. Slice and serve immediately. Makes two 12-inch pizzas.
